name: No-Fuss Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread oil in the bottom of a 13x9 inch cake pan.
2. In the same pan, combine the cake mix, instant chocolate pudding, eggs, and water.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
4. Add the chocolate chips to the mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes.
6. Serve warm with cool whip (no frosting). I find the cake is even more delicious when it cools, as the chocolate chips become crisp.
